title: News, Media & Columns - Natalie Fleet MP | Bolsover
meta_description: Keep updated on the latest news, campaigns and my work on behalf of voters in Bolsover.

text_excerpt: News, Media & Columns - Natalie Fleet MP | Bolsover 0207 219 5665 Email Me HOME ABOUT ME NEWS USEFUL LINKS HELP Contact Visit Parliament Event Request SURGERIES News, Media & Columns Keep updated on Natalie’s work delivering for her constituency — including South Normanton, Tibshelf, Shirebrook, Whitwell, Barlborough, Clowne, Pilsley, Creswell, and many more towns and villages across Bolsover. News Communications Officer (Digital Content Specialist) vacancy in Natalie Fleet MP’s office Natalie Fleet MP is seeking to recruit a Communications Officer (Digital Content Specialist) to join her Westminster office. Read More » Natalie Fleet MP 01/05/2026 News Interview: Natalie Fleet MP on grooming, statutory rape and fighting back At 15, she began seeing an older man and conceived her beloved daughter. It was years before she properly understood it as abuse. Now she is working tirelessly in parliament for other survivors Read More » Natalie Fleet MP 06/11/2025 News “This will protect grooming victims”: Derbyshire MP tables legal reforms to shield children from sex offender parents Bolsover MP Natalie Fleet made a significant breakthrough this week in her long-running campaign for legal reform to protect children whose parents are convicted of sex offences, as she tabled the necessary legislation in the House of Commons. Read More » Natalie Fleet MP 23/10/2025 News Sex offenders to be denied parental responsibility for children born of rape Sex offenders will no longer be entitled to parental responsibility for children conceived through rape, under new measures proposed in parliament for England and Wales. Read More » Natalie Fleet MP 22/10/2025 News Bolsover MP Natalie Fleet spearheads campaign to protect children from abusers Thousands more children will be protected from vile sex offenders under amendments to the Victims and Courts Bill tabled in Parliament on Monday, October 20, thanks to a campaign led by Bolsover MP Natalie Fleet. Read More » Natalie Fleet MP 22/10/2025 News Derbyshire MP who was raped ‘absolutely thrilled’ over law change Rapists will automatically have their parental rights restricted over children conceived through rape, if a government amendment to the Victims and Prisoners bill is passed in parliament. Read More » Natalie Fleet MP 20/10/2025 Load More KEEP UPDATED SUBSCRIBE FOR EMAIL UPDATES Keep Updated Subscribe to my newsletter for updates on my work in Parliament, local campaigns, and news from across Bolsover. I would love to hear from you about what you think my priorities should be as your MP and what matters most to you. Please use the contact form to get in touch with me.
